---
title: "Micromechanical modelling of cellulose hydrogel composites based on coarse-grained
molecular dynamics"
author: ["Mauricio R. Bonilla", "Sridhar K. Kannam", "Matthew T. Downton", "Monika S. Doblin", "Antony Bacic", "Michael J. Gidley", "Jason R. Stokes"]
date: 2025-12-04
publication: "Soft Matter, **21**, 5480-5493 (2025)."
categories: ["Rheology"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1039/d4sm01488j
url_preprint:
journ: "Soft Matter"
issue: 21
page: 5480-5493
year: 2025
image: featured.png
pub_number: 18
---
